name: claude-code-setup-optimizer
description: Dos plugins propios de David García Gordo para trabajar con Claude Code: working-methods (la columna /forge-run — align → draft + grill ×3 → spec → re-grill ×2 → plan → verify, con 2 checkpoints del dueño en lote; /grill, /handoff) y automations (la skill optimize-my-setup, hooks, /release, plantillas de permisos). Para la suite completa (+ forge-methodology, design-review, token-economy) usa el catálogo dedicado davidgarciagordo/claude-plugins.

plugins.name: working-methods
plugins.description: Cross-project working norms: /grill (adversarial ×3) + /handoff (session relay) + forge-on-claude. Model routing and orchestration baked in. (For low-cost comms, pair with the original caveman plugin — JuliusBrussee/caveman.)

plugins.name: automations
plugins.description: La skill optimize-my-setup optimiza TODA la config .claude de un repo a su medida (CLAUDE.md, settings.json permisos/hooks/env, skills, agents generados por invariante, workflows, .mcp.json, output-styles), reutilizando los plugins del usuario. Incluye hook guard-append-only, /release, y templates (permisos, rules CLAUDE.md, reviewers). El usuario elige qué aplicar. Language-agnostic.
